text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: You'll be asked to use GenAI to HELP you answer questions during the lectures,
We encourage you to use GenAI to help your learning (train your human NNs).
But do not use GenAI to bypass the learning process.
